item.description:
## What's Changed

- Redesigned the Recappi Cloud detail view around a single-column Summary and Transcript reading flow.
- Moved meeting playback into a bottom mini player with clearer local-audio, cloud-only, and error states.
- Added compact header actions with recording metadata in an info popover and lower-frequency actions in a More menu.
- Improved structured summaries with TL;DR, key points, decisions, action items, quotes, and compact adaptive topic tags.
- Added Summary / Transcript jump controls and kept them available while scrolling long transcripts.
- Fixed waveform playhead alignment by sharing one timeline between active bars, the playhead, and drag seeking.
- Reduced normal completed transcription chrome while keeping failed or active transcription jobs visible as a thin status banner.
- Hardened local development signing so ad-hoc builds cannot accidentally reset macOS Screen Recording permissions.
- Kept the app foregrounded correctly when manually checking for updates.

## Validation

- `swift test` passed: 72/72 tests.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Local stable-signed `./scripts/build-app.sh` passed.
- Manual Cloud detail verification was performed on the original local app bundle with clean screenshots for folded/expanded Topics, transcript sticky navigation, failed transcription status, audio-not-local state, and waveform mid-playhead alignment.
